Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Further Proceedings
Off Calendar Jan-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS CITIBANK, N.A., HECTOR GUERRERO, CITICORP USA, INC. and CITIGROUP CORPORATE HOLDINGS, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Further Proceedings.

Defendants' (CITIBANK, N.A.; CITIGROUP CORPORATE HOLDINGS, INC.; CITICORP USA, INC.; and HECTOR GUERRERO) motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted. Order is signed.

(SEE WORD MINTUES FOR CMPLETE DETAILS)
